content.en:
Territory of the Tower of War.

In front of a white palace, a group of women are guarding, and this is the residence of the Yunzi Priestess - Yunzi Palace.

As a seven-star god general, and a Taoist ancestor, the Yunzi Divine Maiden occupies a large area in the great universe, and this place is named the Yunzi Domain.

The environment of the large universe is different from that of the ordinary universe, the large universe is mostly continental, there are countless starry sky continents in the void, and the largest starry sky continent is the ancestral monument continent where the ancestral monument is located, which can be called boundless, many times the size of the previous universe.

The Void Heaven Temple is located on the Void Heaven Continent, far away from the Cloud Purple Domain.

But for the gods, this distance is nothing.

Ye Tian's speed was so fast, it didn't take long for him to come to the Cloud Purple Domain.

In front of the Yunzi Palace, Ye Tian came here, and soon entered the Yunzi Palace and saw the Yunzi Goddess.

"I've seen the Cloud Purple Priestess!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Wanfa Daozi is polite, please take a seat!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said, and immediately let all the other maids retreat, and even the Heavenly Monarch who protected the Dao also left.

At this time, there were only two people here, Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden.

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden, do you really have a Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell?" Ye Tian asked with a little urgency.

"Yes!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden said with a smile: "Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has been collecting the Destiny Stone and the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell all these years, and these two treasures should be necessary innate origin items to assist in the cultivation of the Great God's arithmetic. In the chaos, the Great God Arithmetic was listed as one of the great magical powers that could hardly be practiced, and it was almost abandoned, if it weren't for the power of the Great God Arithmetic was really terrifying, otherwise it would have fallen out of the top 100 long ago. Wanfa Daozi must have the Great Divine Arithmetic in his hands, but he has not collected the treasure that fuses the fate talent and the deduction talent, so he already has the divine arithmetic talent?"

"What does Yun Zi Divine Maiden mean by this, do you want to find out my secret?"

Ye Tian's tone was a little bad.

Yun Zi Divine Maiden hurriedly said: "Don't worry about the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, I just want to know that you can practice the Great God Arithmetic, if you are sure to practice the Great God Arithmetic, and do me a favor, then the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell will be given to you, and I will even give you some compensation, how about it?"

"First of all, how can you help?"

Ye Tian asked.

The goddess of the Cloud Purple God moved, slightly surprised.

Although Ye Tian didn't bear that he could practice the Great God Arithmetic, he asked what was the matter, he must be sure to practice the Great God Arithmetic, otherwise there would be no need to ask.

After all, the premise of cooperation is the arithmetic of the great gods!

"I'm going to enter a forbidden land!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden said, "The Great Universe has now given birth to some forbidden lands, and some of them are even dangerous enough to trap the Heavenly Monarch powerhouses on the Heavenly Monarch List. My master told me that there was an opportunity for me in a forbidden place in the great universe, but it was impossible for my master to help, and my master's power could not extend into the great universe. So, I was on my own. But that forbidden place is very dangerous, it is a natural killing array forbidden land, the killing array there is irregular, the rules there are different from other places, and the formation Heavenly Monarch does not have insight into the killing array there. But if you have the arithmetic of the great gods, you can calculate where there is danger and where is safety. If the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi can really practice the arithmetic of the Great God, I hope you can take me into the center of that forbidden land. "

"Okay, I can indeed practice 100% of the great god arithmetic, but your task is bound to be very dangerous, even if I can avoid the killing array, who knows if there are other dangers in it? If there really is an unknown danger in that forbidden place, I can't necessarily figure it out. So, I need more pay, and the Chaos Tortoise Shell alone isn't enough. Ye Tian said clearly.

"Yes, what more do you want?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

"A chaotic supernatural power of the twelve attribute classes, as well as the corresponding innate origin things, do not want the space-time class, and do not want the thunder system. "

Ye Tian thought for a while and said.

"Hehe, even if you want a space-time class, I can't afford it!" Yun Zi Divine Lady rolled her eyes, and then nodded: "Yes, I do have a Chaos Divine Power inheritance in my hand, and there is a Chaos Divine Power that happens to have a corresponding innate origin thing, but it's a pity that I don't have the corresponding talent and can't cultivate." This Chaos Divine Power is a gold-based Chaos Divine Power, called the Gold Devouring Divine Power, which is a relatively rare cultivation type Chaos Divine Power, ranking 121st in the Chaos Divine Power. "

With the narration of the Yun Zi Divine Maiden, Ye Tian had some understanding of the Gold Devouring Divine Power.

Once you practice the gold-devouring supernatural power, you can devour all kinds of metals, condense into a set of full-body armor, and even condense into weapons, the level of armor and weapons is related to your own strength, once you cultivate the gold-devouring supernatural power to the consummation realm, it is even expected that the god will have the armor and weapons of the chaos treasure level, and it is the most suitable armor and weapon for yourself!

But it is also difficult to get started, you need to fuse the devouring talent and the gold talent to form the gold devouring talent, and this talent consumes resources and requires a large amount of metal!

It can be said that the poor gods will not be qualified to devour the golden divine power at all.

In fact, the Yunzi Divine Maiden can also use her place to devour the talent and the gold talent from the God of War Tower, and use the treasure to fuse these two talents into the gold devouring talent, but the price is greater.

But at such a big price, it would not be worth it at all to practice a supernatural power that she didn't like very much.

Moreover, with the place passed down by her Dao ancestors, with her resources, she can only practice two Chaos Divine Powers at most, and if she wants to practice other Chaos Divine Powers, it is impossible for the God of War Tower to help her, and she can only rely on herself.

Therefore, she must choose the most suitable Chaos Divine Power for herself.

Because of this, the gold-devouring supernatural power has been stranded.

If Ye Tian can really help her, then it is not impossible to give Ye Tian the gold-devouring divine power.

"Okay!" Ye Tian agreed on the spot, "I can help you, but after the matter is completed, you must give me the gold-devouring divine power and the corresponding innate origin things." "

"Good!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess also agreed.

After the two signed the agreement, Ye Tian obtained the Chaos Xuan Tortoise Shell.

However, the Yunzi Divine Maiden asked Ye Tian to cultivate the Great Divine Calculation in the Yunzi Palace, and she was not afraid that Ye Tian would run away, but that Ye Tian would be delayed by other things.

Ye Tian didn't care, he could cultivate anywhere.

After staying in a side hall of Yunzi Palace, he was able to cultivate the Great God Arithmetic with all his strength.

Time flies, and thousands of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally practiced the Great God Arithmetic.

After practicing this great divine power, Ye Tian really realized how terrifying the effect of this great divine arithmetic was.

Under the influence of the great god's arithmetic, he was even able to deduce and perfect his martial arts, deduce all the defects in his body, and correct them.

"Terrifying, once I really improve myself, my strength can still improve a little more, even if I can't step into the ranks of the seven-star peak god generals, but it's not much worse. And when I practice one or two Chaos Divine Powers, my strength will definitely be able to step into the Seven-Star Peak Divine General. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.
